Tournament.title: Tournament
Tournament.description: A sports tournament entity. Publicly readable and listable. Writeable by the club owner whose clubId matches the document's clubId.

clubId.description: The ID of the club that owns this tournament

Match.title: Match
Match.description: An individual match. Publicly readable and listable. Writeable by users who own the club associated with this match (clubId).

Club.title: Club
Club.description: Sports club profile. Publicly readable. Writeable only by the user whose auth.uid matches ownerId.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this club

User.title: User
User.description: User profile. Readable and writeable by the user themselves (auth.uid == userId). Admins have global read/list access.

Participant.title: Participant
Participant.description: Tournament player. Publicly readable and listable. Writeable by club owners or the participant themselves.

Sponsor.title: Sponsor
Sponsor.description: Club partner. Publicly readable and listable. Writeable by the club owner.

/tournaments/{tournamentId}.description: Global tournament registry. Publicly readable. Writable by the owner of the club associated with clubId.

/matches/{matchId}.description: Match score records. Publicly readable. Writable by the club owner associated with clubId.

/clubs/{clubId}.description: Sports organization profiles. Publicly readable. Writable only by the owner (ownerId).

/users/{userId}.description: User profile data. Readable and writable by the owner (userId). Admins have global read/list access.

/participants/{participantId}.description: Tournament entries. Publicly readable. Writable by the club owner or the player themselves.

/sponsors/{sponsorId}.description: Club partnership details. Publicly readable. Writable only by the club owner (clubId).
